content: Illustrative MSCI-style issuer credit assessment for Meridian Freight, dated 2025-11-14 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. This assessment agrees with the Moody's anchor at BBB-, keeping Meridian just inside investment grade. Two providers place Meridian in investment grade and one in high yield, so the reconciliation highlights a boundary-straddling divergence where a single notch matters.
